rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE AKIKO SPINDLE 2021 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: FUTURE ACCOUNTING
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The beneficiary passed away during this second account. The Trustee's Final Account and Report. The account must cover from 7/1/22 to the death of death, and to current. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDDIE MAE LUCKETT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/17/2026. Please resolve the following petition issues no later than one week before the scheduled date: (1) Notice of hearing must be given to all persons entitled. (2) Notice of Directions for Remote Appearance and Access must be given, too. LRSF 14.1.C. (3) Proposed order must be submitted. LRSF 14.7.A.1). (4) Need the petitioner's position and/or responsive action as to the opposition. (5) Petition caption alleges waiver of account; however, no written waiver of account is on file. Depending on the response to the above issue, the petition needs to clarify whether all eligible distributees' waivers of account are on file or not. In the absence of an account, a new or amended final account petition seems appropriate. (6) Petition to propose allocation of statutory compensation to the attorneys for the personal rep. PrC. 10814. (7) Need explanation on request for reimbursement for 6/25/2025 special appearance counsel-court hearing for $281.75. There was no hearing requiring an appearance. (8) Need an explanation of the TBD requests for reimbursement of delivery costs. If the funds have been paid, an update seems necessary. The following issue in the objection needs to be cleared: (1) Objection seeks the court's authorization to distribute. Appears a fully noticed petition, with proper notice of hearing (PrC 11604(d)) may be necessary.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YU AN YANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to the next available date (4/15/2026). The following issues must be cleared two weeks prior: (1) Clarification is needed on whether the petitioner's request is based on the claim that the decedent's 50% is community property. If so, the petitioner must show how the property should be characterized when the deed expressly states it is the decedent's sole and separate property. Documentary evidence of transmutation from the decedent's separate property to community property must be filed. The proposed order merely conclusively indicates the asset is community property. (2) If the petition relies on the parents' consent and assignments to transfer the parents' 25% shares in the real property (one-half of the parents' intestate succession), the petition must present under which authority the Court can grant the request when section 13650 does not authorize such relief. Decedent's administration seems necessary to effectuate the parents' assignment. Also, the petition must specifically identify the percentage of the petitioner's succession out of the decedent's shares.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DENIS ALBERTO MENDOZA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/24/2026. The following issues (e-mailed to petitioner in pro per on 02/13/2026) must be addressed: 1) No proof of publication is on file. 2) Re the DE-121 form filed on 02/09/2026: i) The name of the county must be specified in the caption. ii) Item 1 must be completed. iii) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) Item 2d of petition: At least one box must be checked and completed. If all other beneficiaries have waived petitioner's bond, signed waivers must be filed on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-142. If bond waivers cannot be obtained, petitioner must give a full bond ($241,000), in which case please confirm that petitioner is bondable for the full amount. 4) Item 8 must list each stepchild or foster child who would have been adopted by decedent but for a legal barrier, as the first box of item 6b was checked.
